items.visual_description: A rectangular, transparent turquoise glass perfume bottle with a matching architectural, fluted cap. It has a gold-colored label on the front with black text that reads 'TOM FORD', 'FLEUR DE PORTOFINO', 'EAU DE PARFUM', '50 ML'.

overall_description: This is a product image of a Tom Ford Fleur de Portofino perfume bottle. The design is modern and striking, characterized by its vibrant turquoise color and the contrast with the metallic gold label.
